summary: postmortem-maker is a published, installable runx skill (epistemedeus/postmortem-maker@sha-1d497f39e48b) that turns incident fragments — incident_timeline[], alerts[], deploy_events[], chat_notes[], and a postmortem_policy — into a traceable postmortem where every timeline entry and root-cause claim cites input evidence, unresolved facts go to unknowns[], and a gated publish_proposal for the doc-publisher executor is emitted only when the evidence is consistent — never posting or assigning anything. Local harness passed 3/3; the post-publish dogfood run on the consistent-evidence input sealed receipt runx:receipt:sha256:dcf429329ec50227edbe7c9a4285b5c2a92b6e9f5504ee7ba782090cbdf4c60c with root_cause determined, unknowns=0, action_items=2, and publish_proposal proposed, and runx verify returned valid.
observations: runx CLI version: runx-cli 0.6.14 (publish, install, dogfood, and verify were all run with this binary).
Publisher owner: epistemedeus. Package name: postmortem-maker (exact). Version: 0.1.0.
Registry ref: epistemedeus/postmortem-maker@sha-1d497f39e48b. Public adoption page (public_url): https://runx.ai/x/epistemedeus/postmortem-maker@sha-1d497f39e48b.
Source/provenance (source_url): https://github.com/epistemedeus/postmortem-maker/tree/9e7094355f6a43a347b5bee780b45271ca3a8358.
Pull request against runxhq/runx (pr_url): https://github.com/runxhq/runx/pull/258. Head commit: 0da32427b41d0669664c606feb3fbd8f3adbbf99.
Raw X.yaml from the PR head commit: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/epistemedeus/runx/0da32427b41d0669664c606feb3fbd8f3adbbf99/skills/postmortem-maker/X.yaml.
Raw SKILL.md from the PR head commit: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/epistemedeus/runx/0da32427b41d0669664c606feb3fbd8f3adbbf99/skills/postmortem-maker/SKILL.md.
Publish method: runx login --provider github --for publish; runx registry publish ./skills/postmortem-maker/SKILL.md --registry https://api.runx.ai (result: success).

Install command: runx add epistemedeus/postmortem-maker@sha-1d497f39e48b --registry https://api.runx.ai — clean install verified: status=installed, digest sha256:12c1939b81f0e3f6dc68cea5b372f3efe425c8d78820c30f808408243ec922fe matches the registry digest, package signature runx-registry-ed25519-v1.

runx registry read epistemedeus/postmortem-maker@sha-1d497f39e48b --registry https://api.runx.ai --json resolves the published metadata and digests: digest 12c1939b81f0e3f6dc68cea5b372f3efe425c8d78820c30f808408243ec922fe, profile_digest 7a4d2967a6541ec55ee891fca251ebfa7c9383b77b58b86366053095ca2ba8e1, publisher epistemedeus, trust tier community.

Local harness (pre-publish): status=passed (3/3, 0 assertion errors, with the X.yaml expect.output packet assertions), cases=[consistent-evidence-yields-proposal:sealed, ambiguous-evidence-withholds-proposal:sealed, refuses-without-policy-or-evidence:failure]; full output committed at skills/postmortem-maker/harness/harness-output.json.
Hosted registry harness (post-publish): green — the registry publish gate ran the hosted harness including the refuses-without-policy-or-evidence stop case, and the publish succeeded.

Dogfood command: runx skill epistemedeus/postmortem-maker@sha-1d497f39e48b --registry https://api.runx.ai --input-json incident_timeline='...' --input-json alerts='...' --input-json deploy_events='...' --input-json chat_notes='...' --input-json postmortem_policy='...' --receipt-dir <dir> -j (the consistent-evidence fixture inputs).

Dogfood receipt_ref (post-publish run of epistemedeus/postmortem-maker@sha-1d497f39e48b, not a harness fixture seal): runx:receipt:sha256:dcf429329ec50227edbe7c9a4285b5c2a92b6e9f5504ee7ba782090cbdf4c60c.
runx verify verdict on the dogfood receipt: valid (Ed25519 signature valid in production mode, issuer kid epistemedeus-secret-catcher).

Dogfood timeline count: 7 — every timeline entry cites its input evidence ref (deploy_events[0], alerts[0], incident_timeline[0], incident_timeline[1], chat_notes[0], incident_timeline[2], alerts[1]).

Dogfood impact: 1 critical alert fired and 1 resolved (max severity critical); impact window 2026-03-14T09:10:00Z -> 2026-03-14T09:55:00Z (45 minutes), evidence alerts[0], alerts[1]; no figure is inferred beyond the supplied records.

Dogfood root_cause status: determined — deploy of checkout-api 2026.03.14.1 (deploy_events[0]) preceded the incident start (alerts[0]) and is corroborated by incident_timeline[1] and chat_notes[0]; the root-cause claim cites all four refs.
Dogfood unknowns: 0 (unknown_count=0 — no untimed, contradictory, or unresolved facts on this input).

Dogfood action_items: 2 (AI-1: add a pre-deploy safeguard or automated rollback for checkout-api; AI-2: review alert 'checkout-5xx-rate' threshold and runbook), each citing evidence, owner=null — the skill assigns no work.

Dogfood proposal status: proposed — postmortem.status=ready_for_review and the publish_proposal is gated: performed_by=doc-publisher, requires_approval=true, target postmortems/2026-03-14-checkout-api.md; postmortem-maker posts nothing and assigns no live tasks.
Receipt id: sha256:dcf429329ec50227edbe7c9a4285b5c2a92b6e9f5504ee7ba782090cbdf4c60c.

Harness case semantics: the consistent case seals with a proposal; the ambiguous case seals with unknowns (root cause undetermined, proposal withheld); the no-policy/no-evidence case is the governed stop.

New-user path: install with 'runx add epistemedeus/postmortem-maker@sha-1d497f39e48b --registry https://api.runx.ai', run 'runx skill epistemedeus/postmortem-maker@sha-1d497f39e48b --registry https://api.runx.ai --input-json incident_timeline='...' --input-json alerts='...' --input-json deploy_events='...' --input-json chat_notes='...' --input-json postmortem_policy='...' --receipt-dir <dir> -j', and verify the sealed receipt with 'runx verify --receipt receipt.json --json'. verification.json records the public key so verification needs no private context.

dogfood.input: consistent-evidence scenario: a checkout-api 2026.03.14.1 deploy (09:05Z) precedes a critical checkout-5xx-rate alert (09:10Z); a rollback timeline event and an sre-oncall chat note corroborate the deploy as root cause; the alert resolves at 09:55Z; policy allows publish with required sections [summary, timeline, impact, root_cause, action_items]
dogfood.command: runx skill epistemedeus/postmortem-maker@sha-1d497f39e48b --registry https://api.runx.ai --input-json incident_timeline='...' --input-json alerts='...' --input-json deploy_events='...' --input-json chat_notes='...' --input-json postmortem_policy='...' --receipt-dir <dir> -j
